data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of version control, specifically tracking which version of the waiver was signed. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or mechanisms that confirm the existence of version control for the signed waivers. The linked use case mentions the need for version control but does not provide any concrete evidence or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality, leading to a clear gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of version control tracking for signed waivers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
